_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: User focus involves understanding the user needs to develop a detailed understanding of the problems that need to be solved.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-007 (LS, cosine: 0.346), AI-S-008 (AI, cosine: 0.343).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.7/10 (raw 0.366). Shared vocabulary: [problems]. DDaT-only terms [detailed, develop, focus, involves, needs, solved] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, application, causes, code, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.849 (P=0.863, R=0.836). P exceeds R by 0.027 — the DDaT element's 20 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DDaT element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "User focus involves understanding the user needs to develop a detailed understan" and "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.340 ≈ STS 0.366 (gap 0.026). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [problems] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [problems]. DDaT-only: [detailed, develop, focus, involves, needs, solved]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, application, causes, code, data].
